analysis_result: Median sonidegib 39 vs vehicle 31 days; log-rank p=0.1357 (not significant)
discrepancy_analysis: Both the paper and the model agree that sonidegib treatment did not produce a statistically significant survival benefit in the STS-26T xenograft model. The model reports median survival of 39 days (sonidegib) vs 31 days (vehicle) with log-rank p=0.1357, which is above the conventional significance threshold of 0.05. This matches the paper's reported finding of no statistically significant improvement. CONCORDANT.
